title: Electric motor with a support device between a stator and a housing
abstract: The present subject matter relates to a rotary electrical machine (100) that includes a rotor, a stator (104), a housing (110) and a support device (112). The rotor is rotatable about a rotational axis (116). The stator (104) is in coaxial arrangement to the rotor. The stator (104) includes a stator core (106) and winding (108a; 108b). The housing (110) includes a chamber defined by a closed end (120) at one end and an open end (118) at another end. The chamber at least substantially receives the rotor and the stator (104). A housing inner surface and a stator core outer surface forms an annular space (114) that extends axially there-between. The support device (112) is at least in part disposed between the stator core (106) and the housing (110). The support device (112) at least in part spans the annular space (114). The support device (112) is adapted to at least restrict radial shifting of the stator core (106) with respect to the rotational axis (116).
claims: Claims Claims 1 . Rotary electrical machine (100) comprising: a rotor rotatable about a rotational axis (116); a stator (104), in coaxial arrangement to the rotor, comprising a stator core (106) and winding (108a; 108b); a housing (110) comprising a chamber (122) defined by a closed end (120) at one end and an open end (118) at another end, the chamber (122) at least substantially receiving the rotor and the stator (104), wherein a housing inner surface (300) and a stator core outer surface (304) forms an annular space (114) extending axially there-between; a support device (112) at least in part disposed between the stator core (106) and the housing (110), said support device (112) at least in part spanning the annular space (114) and adapted to at least restrict radial shifting of the stator core (106) with respect to the rotational axis (116) wherein the stator core (106) extends in length along an axial direction, one end of the stator core (106), along the axial direction, is mounted to the housing (110) by fasteners, and the other end is supported by virtue of the support device (112). 2. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the support device (112) comprises a bottom surface (402) facing the closed end (120) of the housing (110) and seated on a first recess (204) formed on the housing inner surface (300), wherein the first recess (204) is an undercut formed radially outward from the rotational axis (116). 3. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 2, wherein the support device (112) comprises at least one channel (202) that is at least partially formed and extending in an axial direction parallel to the rotational axis (116). 4. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 3, wherein the support device (112) defines at least one flange (200) that extend axially from the bottom surface (402) of the support device (112). 5. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 4, wherein each of the at least one flange (200) is disposed into a second recess (206) formed on the housing inner surface (300), the second recess (206) being an undercut formed radially outward from the rotational axis (116). 6. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 5, wherein the first recess (204) is formed further away in the radial direction, from the rotational axis (116), than the second recess (206). 7. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 3, wherein the at least one channel (202) is at least partially formed on an inner side (404) of the support device (112). 8. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein the at least one flange (200) is formed in close proximity to the inner side (404) and each of the at least one channel (202) is formed along one of the at least one flange (200), wherein the at least one channel (202) extends in the axial direction. 9. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in claim 8, wherein the stator core (106) comprises corresponding partial channels (500) that correspond to the at least one channel (202) formed on the support device (112), said at least one channel (202) and the corresponding partial channels (500) form a duct configured for flow of the cooling medium. 10. Rotary electrical machine (100) as claimed in any one of claims 2 to 8, wherein the at least one channel (202) forms a duct in the support device (112) and the duct is oriented in the axial direction.
